scripts.install:all: pnpm install --prefix ConCat_client && pnpm install --prefix ConCat_server
scripts.build: pnpm run build:client && pnpm run build:server
scripts.start: pnpm run build && pnpm run start:prod --prefix ConCat_server
scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm run dev --prefix ConCat_client" "pnpm run start:dev --prefix ConCat_server"
